creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
New diff due to file renaming to avoid conflict with devel/mm:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Sun Sep 23 12:54:22 2007
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Tue Nov 13 01:27:04 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.142
+PORTVERSION=	4.143
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@

  DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

-MAN1=		munger.1
+MAN1=		munger.1 minimunger.1
  MANCOMPRESSED=	yes

  OPTIONS=	SQL  "include SQLite interface"  on \
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Sun Sep 23 12:54:22 2007
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Tue Nov 13 01:26:01 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.142.tar.gz) = f7691f9fcf7f668010b7f8a0d661612e
-SHA256 (munger-4.142.tar.gz) = 
a05235db9a2269f0c9c85b066d9949c74388dd9481700c6259cca3ae7773fea5
-SIZE (munger-4.142.tar.gz) = 292417
+MD5 (munger-4.143.tar.gz) = 0a1ccca95b1d2fb7d56c8fcd53012b41
+SHA256 (munger-4.143.tar.gz) = 
99199f0cb89fcdc084b4496fde6151b4f0a7ba04dc1ec65e26a188d5a918dfe3
+SIZE (munger-4.143.tar.gz) = 325467
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ./munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist	Sun Sep 23 12:54:22 2007
+++ ./munger/pkg-plist	Tue Nov 13 01:26:50 2007
@@ -1,5 +1,7 @@
  bin/munger
  lib/libmunger.so.33
+lib/libminimunger.a
+include/minimunger.h
  %%DKNS_BIN%%
  %%DATADIR%%/ipdatabase.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/compiler.munger
@@ -33,4 +35,10 @@
  %%DATADIR%%/tk.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/cal.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/xml2buffer.munger
+%%DATADIR%%/mm.munger
+%%DATADIR%%/options.mm
+%%DATADIR%%/fmt.mm
+%%DATADIR%%/grep.mm
+%%DATADIR%%/stacks.mm
+%%DATADIR%%/cgi.mm
  @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
